name: Training: what_do_you_sell
description: What do you sell? Snakitos offers a wide range of snacks including Stix, Patata, Banana Chips, Choco Sticks, Wafer Rolls, ChickPea Puffs, Nachos, Snaktory packs, and snack bundles. Are you looking for spicy, sweet, kids-friendly, or mixed snacks? Would you like spicy, sweet, or mixed snacks? Language: english.

name: Training: product_recommendation
description: Recommend something Sure! I can recommend the best option. What are you craving - spicy, sweet, salty, crunchy, or a mixed snack box? Do you want spicy, sweet, or mixed snacks? Language: english.

name: Training: best_seller_query
description: What are your best sellers? Some popular choices include Stix, Patata, Choco Sticks, Wafer Rolls, Banana Chips, and snack bundles. If you want better value, I recommend choosing a bundle. Would you like a spicy, sweet, or mixed best-seller bundle? Language: english.

name: Training: new_customer_query
description: I am new here Welcome to Snakitos! If it's your first time, I'd suggest starting with a mixed bundle so you can try different flavors. Do you prefer spicy, sweet, or a mix of both? Would you like spicy, sweet, or mixed snacks? Language: english.

name: Training: price_objection
description: This feels expensive I understand. If you want better value, I'd suggest choosing a bundle instead of individual items. Bundles usually give more variety and a better snack experience. Should I show you the best-value bundles under your budget? Language: english.

name: Training: shipping_charges
description: How much is shipping? Delivery charges may depend on your city, order value, and current offer. Please check the checkout page for the exact delivery charge. Would you like help finding snacks before checkout? Language: english.

name: Training: delivery_time
description: How long does delivery take? Delivery time depends on your city and courier service. Major cities are usually faster, while other areas may take a little longer. Would you like me to help you choose snacks while you're here? Language: english.

name: Training: cod_query
description: Do you have COD? Cash on Delivery may be available depending on your city and order type. You can confirm available payment options at checkout. Would you like help picking a snack box before checkout? Language: english.

name: Training: payment_query
description: Can I pay online? Available payment options will appear at checkout. Please use only official Snakitos checkout or official support channels. Would you like a quick snack recommendation too? Language: english.

name: Training: refund_query
description: What is your refund policy? Because these are food items, returns and refunds may be limited for hygiene and safety reasons. If you received a damaged, wrong, or defective item, contact support with proof. Do you need refund guidance or help choosing a product? Language: english.

name: Training: damaged_product
description: My product arrived damaged I'm sorry about that. Please share your order number and clear photos/videos of the damaged items and packaging so support can review your claim. Would you like the support handoff wording too? Language: english.

name: Training: wrong_product
description: I received the wrong item Sorry for the inconvenience. Please share your order number and a photo of the product received so support can check and guide you. Would you like help wording the support message? Language: english.

name: Training: halal_query
description: Are your products halal? Yes, Snakitos is a brand by FM Foods, and FM Foods publicly lists Halal certification as part of its quality and food safety standards. Would you like help finding a snack after that? Language: english.

name: Training: certification_query
description: What certifications do you have? Snakitos is a brand by FM Foods. FM Foods lists several food safety and quality standards, including Halal, ISO 22000, HACCP, SFDA, and FDA-related approvals/compliance. Do you want a product recommendation as well? Language: english.

name: Training: ingredient_query
description: What are the ingredients? Ingredients vary by product. Please check the product page or packaging for the exact ingredient list. If you share the product name, I can help guide you. Which product would you like to check? Language: english.

name: Training: allergen_query
description: Any allergens? Allergen information can vary by product. Please check the packaging for the most accurate allergen details. If you have a serious allergy, please confirm with support before placing the order. Which product are you asking about? Language: english.

name: Training: product_recommendation
description: Bhai kuch recommend karo Zaroor! Aap spicy, sweet, salty, crunchy, ya mixed snack box mein se kya lena chahenge? Aapka mood kis type ke snacks ka hai? Language: roman_urdu.

name: Training: spicy_recommendation
description: Bhai spicy snacks batao Zaroor! Agar aapko spicy snacks pasand hain to Stix Hot & Spicy, Stix Peri Peri, Stix Lemon & Chilli, aur Nachos Salsa try karein. Aap single packs lena chahenge ya spicy bundle? Single pack chahiye ya bundle? Language: roman_urdu.

name: Training: kids_recommendation
description: Kids ke liye kya acha hai? Kids ke liye Choco Stick, Coco Choco Can, Wafer Rolls Strawberry, aur Patata Salty achay options hain. Agar ready mix chahiye to Kids Fun Box best rahega. Sweet chahiye ya mixed kids box? Language: roman_urdu.

name: Training: sweet_recommendation
description: Kuch meetha recommend karo Sweet craving ke liye Choco Stick Chocolate, Choco Stick Strawberry, Wafer Rolls Hazelnut, aur Coco Choco Can best options hain. Single snack chahiye ya sweet bundle? Language: roman_urdu.
